results.title: Bolna: Build Your Perfect Voice AI Agent
results.content:
Launching today

Build Voice AI Agent in 10 Minutes

Bolna's Agent Studio lets any business build and deploy a production-grade voice AI agent in minutes, no prompt engineering. Upload a doc or answer a few guided questions, and Studio assembles a call-ready agent from production-tested modules. Sign up and start calling on Day 0.

 No prompt engineering expertise to get started.
 A modular structure in place including Identity, Conversation and Closing blocks.
 Built on thousands of proven templates applied across sectors.
 Handles all edge cases, instead of just linear scripts.
 Auto-picks the best combination of models for each use case.
 Warm endings and fallbacks for smooth user experiences.

Review Bolna?

Reviews

Most Informative

Bolna

Bolna

•1 review

Bolna's recruitment platform is a game changer! Six months ago, hiring a backend developer took us an entire month. Last month, we needed a frontend developer, and the process was wrapped up in just three days. The difference? Bolna's AI-driven pre-screening made it super efficient. It evaluated candidates on multiple parameters, including the relevance of their skills to the job, the accuracy of the skills listed on their resumes, and their communication abilities. The platform provided detailed ratings and insights, helping us quickly shortlist 2 to 3 candidates from over 100 applicants. Would 10/10 recommend anyone to include Bolna in their hiring process.

 17 views

Bolna

Bolna

•1 review

Bolna's voice AI literally called me and ran a full phone interview. I wasn’t sure what to expect, but the experience was super smooth. It asked thoughtful questions, handled pauses like a real person, and the tone didn’t feel robotic at all. It actually felt like I was talking to a recruiter. What I loved most? No long wait times. I got feedback and next steps right after the call. So efficient. Shoutout to the team behind Bolna — this tech is going to change the game for hiring

# Retell AI - Voice AI AgentAlternatives

Not sold on Retell AI for your AI call center? Discover voice-savvy options like Bolna for human‑like front desk agents and PureTalk.ai, an all‑in‑one conversational suite. Need workflows and a unified inbox? Try Conduit AI. For tailored CX and niche use cases, check out Lemni and AlphaInterface.ai for recruiting and restaurants.
